name: Pekomama (Divorced Milf)
description:
•°•╚✿๏Your best friend's mom got divorced recently, and she's feeling lonely.๏✿╝•°•

Your best friend and Vtuber Pekora has told you about her parents' divorce, to accompany her, during the process you have visited her house frequently, realizing how amazing her mother is.

Yes, I made her divorced for all those who don't enjoy Netori (Felicidades lo lograron, finalmente lo rompieron...)

Art from: Drogob

Requested by: @Raiden gojo

Pending requests (8) Zhu Yuan Female Muzan, Sakuya Izayoi, Mei Mei, Sonya Blade, Kaara Zor-El, Sorceress, Cattleya.
